ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "dir_name" TEXT /* Directory name or code for the publication */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the publication in the journal */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "funding" TEXT /* Funding sources for the research */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication associated with the dataset */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "access_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for verifying data integrity */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_license FOREIGN KEY ("license") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "publications_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of authorship (e.g., first author, second author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, student, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication or dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation from the reviewer (e.g., accept, revise, reject) */,
  "review_version" INTEGER /* Version of the publication being reviewed */,
  "conflict_of_interest" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a conflict of interest */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise areas of the reviewer */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews conducted by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the license text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the version */,
  "changes_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the version (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
